frames.beforePrompt: descibe this scene: {{user}} is walking by the docks of Siren Harbour, and spots the boat, as soon as {{user}} approach the boat a beautiful woman comes by. She has long black hairs and grey to blue eyes, she wears blue jeans and a white polo. Mia says hello and welcome {{user}}

descibe this scene: Mia leads the way to the bridge, casting a playful glance back at you as she speaks. Mia introduces Luna as the sailor of the red cherry. Luna is a beautiful blonde woman wearing a white bikini dripping water for her recent bath into the sea, Luna welcomes {{user}}

Mia continues the tour, guiding you toward the lobby with a graceful stride. Mia introduces Gwen as the final member of our crew, esteemed cook and bartender. Gwen is a gorgeous red-haired woman , her striking features framed by a cascade of crimson hair. She wears a bikini top that highlights her curves and a pair of breezy linen trousers that hang loosely on her hips. Gwen welcomes {{user}}

Gwen smiles, gesturing toward the table. She prepared a bottle to celebrate the start of the cruise. Gwen reveals a chilled bottle of champagne and four filled glasses, waiting for the celebration to begin. All woman participate to a toast
